description: Input schema for NextDecade Guidance documents. Guidance is advisory (best-practice recommendations); shorter than Standards or Procedures — no Definitions, References, Exception, or Continuous Improvement sections.

document_name.description: Document title shown on the cover page and in the running header. e.g., 'Remote Work Guidance'.

doc_number.description: NextDecade document number in ORG-NTD-000010-XXX-GDN-##### format. Shown on cover and in header.

guideline_intro.description: Intro paragraph of the GUIDELINE section.
